site.description: Intelligent Data Solution for Disaster Risk Reduction (IDS-DRR) is an open-source platform that helps state-level and district-level Disaster Management Authorities to make timely data-driven decisions, prioritise expenditure of public funds and conduct public procurement in a manner that strengthens long-term disaster risk reduction and protects the most vulnerable people from the adverse effects of extreme weather events and climate change.
site.creator: CivicDataLab
site.keywords: Climate Actions, Assam, DRR, Disaster, Risk Score

analytics.description: Explore flood-risk profiles at the district and sub-district level across states in India, developed using the IDS-DRR data model

stories.heading: Data Stories
stories.description: Read about the impact, methods, and successes in using data for DRR
